summary: Complete backend testing of Proposal Digital Signature Stamping feature. All 9 tests pass. The feature correctly adds a digital signature (text stamp 'Approved by: {name}  |  Date: {date}') to the bottom center of the last page of PDF proposals when approved. Non-PDF files (DOCX) are approved without stamping and don't break.
passed_tests: Upload PDF proposal to a lead - returns 200 with pending_review status
Approve PDF proposal - stamps document and changes status to 'approved'
Download approved PDF - contains signature text 'Approved by: {name}  |  Date: {date}'
Signature text includes approver's name correctly
Signature text includes approval date in 'Month DD, YYYY' format
Non-PDF (DOCX) proposal approves without errors and no stamping
Proposal status correctly changes from 'pending_review' to 'approved'
Signature placed only on last page of multi-page PDFs
Rejected proposals do NOT get digital signature
Proposals with 'changes_requested' do NOT get digital signature
critical_code_review_comments: stamp_pdf_with_signature function correctly uses reportlab and PyPDF2
Signature uses 8pt Helvetica font - appropriate subtle size
Gray color (0.4, 0.4, 0.4 alpha 0.8) provides subtle appearance
Signature positioned 30 points from bottom, center-aligned
Error handling: if stamping fails, approval still proceeds
File size increases after stamping (original ~1418 bytes -> ~1600 bytes)
Review comments history properly tracks all approval actions
seed_data_creation: Test leads and proposals created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Digital signature stamping feature tested. Signature format: 'Approved by: {approver_name}  |  Date: {Month DD, YYYY}'. Stamp placed at bottom center of last page only. Uses reportlab for PDF generation and PyPDF2 for merging. Only PDF files get stamped; DOCX files are approved without stamping. Backend endpoint: PUT /api/leads/{lead_id}/proposal/review with {action: 'approved', comment: '...'}

verified_signature_format.example: Approved by: System Admin  |  Date: February 24, 2026
verified_signature_format.position: Bottom center of last page, 30 points from bottom
